description: Generate a NACA 0012 airfoil (100-200 panels) and perform an XFoil direct analysis with a Reynolds Number of 1,000,000, Mach 0.0, and Ncrit 9. Configure forced boundary layer transition with trip locations at 0.05 (5% chord) for the top surface and 0.10 (10% chord) for the bottom surface. Run the polar analysis for an Angle of Attack (Alpha) range from -5 to 15 degrees with a step of 0.5 or 1.0. Save the project as forced_transition_naca0012.wpa in /home/ga/Documents/projects/.
